item_description: Slows down time before food burns, giving you a chance to save every dish.
Gain x2 Experience poin when the stage is done.
A tiny chick with a big dream helps increase waiting time by cheering you on while you cook!
A gentle capybara who loves kitchen heat and happy vibes. Cappy boosts your cooking performance with calm energy and adorable focus.
A cheerful little cat who zips around the kitchen, helping dishes cook faster.
A tiny keroro of charm, giving you more customer time and quicker cooking!
Currency earned from duplicates and gacha rolls.
Currency earned from completing stages or purchasable at the Jelly Shop.
A charming flower vase that brightens any kitchen corner and adds a warm, cozy atmosphere to your cooking space.
A soft, warm lamp that lights up your kitchen with a gentle glow, making every cooking moment feel calm and comforting.
A sweet axolotl who makes cooking faster and helps customers wait calmly with her warm, friendly aura.
A dreamy unicorn who speeds up meals, soothes customers, and rewards you with magical bonus points.
